== Notes for [[Item:Q118083|Q118083]] ==

PEDRO SALVADOR filho de Salvador Mendes N 3 casou com D. Sancha Martins de Braga

5 Vicente, ou Vasco Pires Dulguezes

5 João Pires Dulguezes § 2

5 Fernão Pires Dulguezes § 4

5 D. Estevainha Pires casada s.m.n.

(Gayo, tit. Barradas § 1 N 4).

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
